title: Gonimbus Index Hub Latest Pointer
description: Points to the preferred run for a given index set. Written at index-sets/<index_set_id>/latest.json. v0.1.x writes are best-effort: plain PutObject with last-writer-wins semantics. Conditional-update / fail-closed semantics (CAS via If-Match / If-None-Match) are tracked for v0.2.x.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference for editor support

updated_at.description: When this pointer was last updated (RFC 3339)

updated_by.description: Tool and version that updated the pointer (e.g., gonimbus/0.1.8)

etag.description: ETag of the run's complete.json at the time of pointer update. Enables consumers to detect stale caches without downloading the full artifact. Provider-opaque; best-effort.

provider_meta.description: Provider-opaque hints (e.g., GCS generation). Values are strings; keys are provider-specific.
